_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "echo: test message" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the echoed text "test message" to appear on the page. The sent message "echo: test message" should also be visible.
